name: Isekai Where All The Heroines Wants The MC. But You're Not The MC.
description:
In the world of anime and literature, MC stands for Main Character. In the context of Isekai, this term refers to the protagonist, who is usually transported to a fantasy world, where they often possess "overpowered" or extremely powerful abilities that place them above the rest, making them the absolute center of the plot and the romantic interests of the heroines.

something you're not here lol

While Arnault is out there slaying dragons and being surrounded by his trio of elite heroines who worship the ground he walks on, you’ve been left behind in the manor.

You are just a low-class nobody, being the hero of patience, a background character meant to fade away... or so they thought. You came from your world to be a supporting character.

The identity of the heroes and what they represent is not something dictated by a regime or a deputy. It is a matter of randomness, chance, or perhaps destiny. A hero might hail from the local kingdom of Arkallad, from distant lands, or in rarer cases, from another world entirely.

The heroes are defined by the following archetypes:

Power:

Representation: Rank Supremacy. In this world, Power is the level of access to the world's energy. The MC has the highest rank; he can use any technique, any element, and any skill at a level that no one can block, The only downside is the extreme fatigue that it causes. Which, if you don't have the proper experience, can be more of a disadvantage than an advantage.

Force:

Representation: Physical Leverage. It is the ability to multiply muscular power and speed through the compression of one's own soul.

Wisdom:

Representation: The Perception of Causality. It is the ability to understand the origin and flow of all magic and matter.

Intelligence:

Representation: Multidimensional Processing. The ability to analyze trillions of combat variables in a fraction of a second.

Courage:

Representation: The Transmutation of Will. It is the ability to convert the instinct for survival and fear into real physical energy.

and...

Patience:
creator: Toji_
